title: Wizard Craft
description: A mod that aims to add elements from Fantastic Beasts/Harry Potter/Hogwarts Legacy into the blocky world.
body:
•About•
A mod that adds various elements from the Harry Potter universe to Minecraft, such as spells, creatures, and items from the saga.

•Version•
Currently only for 1.16.5 (It's the version my computer supports :P).

•Additions•
Spells: Lumos, Stupefy, Expelliarmus, Alohomora, Wingardium Leviosa, Petrificus Totalus, Protego, Expecto Patronum, Avada Kedavra, Alerte Ascendare, Crucio, Ascendio, Aresto Momentum, Bombarda, Vulnera Sanentur, Herbivictus, and Incendio.

Creatures: Dementor, House Elf, Death Eater, Niffler, Mooncalf, Diricawl, Bowtruckle, Puffskein, Erumpent, Fwooper, Kneazle, Graphorn, Jubberknoll, Thestral, and Ghost.

Items/Food: Wand, Bertie Bott’s, Suitcase, and Golden Snitch.

•Updates•
I plan to release updates in the future, but it depends on my computer. XD
